name: On the Impact of Paul Otellini's CEO Years at Intel (Tech.pinions, Published Version)
description: Published Tech.pinions column by Peter Kastner assessing the 40-year Intel career and 8-year CEO tenure (2005-2013) of Paul Otellini, organized across four dimensions: technology (tick-tock model, multi-core, High-K metal gate, 3D tri-gate, performance-per-watt), growth (BRIC geographies, mobile, software via McAfee and Wind River, intelligent systems), competition (AMD retake, ARM mobile threat), and finance (revenue up 60% to ~$53B; dividend initiation). Notes the missed-iPhone cost to Intel and the new emerging devices division.
